name: Воин Гордыни
description: Monks who become Warriors of Pride value themselves above all. These monks focus on mastering their form, ego, and their destructive power. They display monastic aesthetics publicly with the intention of gaining the respect and admiration of "lesser beings." The prideful traditions of this order include adorning themselves with jewelry, hiding their scars, and commanding respect from those who would oppose them.

features.name: Tall Tales
features.description: You have gained a knack for telling embellished tales of your past achievements. You gain proficiency in one of the following skills of your choice: {@skill Deception}, {@skill Intimidation}, {@skill Performance}, or {@skill Persuasion}.

features.name: Bruised Ego
features.description: Your ego strengthens as you fight to prove your value. When you expend a Focus Point, you can also gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of 1 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Point|XPHB}). While you are {@variantrule Bloodied|XPHB}, you gain twice that amount instead.

features.name: Assertive Attacker
features.description: While you are {@variantrule Bloodied|XPHB}, you add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with {@variantrule Unarmed Strikes|XPHB} and Monk weapons.

features.name: Inescapable Retribution
features.description: Damage dealt to you is damage dealt to your pride, and that is something you simply can't allow. Whenever a creature deals damage to you, you can take a {@action Reaction|XPHB} and expend 1 Focus Point. You have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against that creature until the end of your next turn.

features.name: Redoubled Efforts
features.description: When you score a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} while you are {@variantrule Bloodied|XPHB}, you can roll one additional damage die when determining the extra damage dealt by the attack.

features.name: Ever Prideful
features.description: When you are reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and not killed outright, you can expend 1 Focus Point to enter a trance. While in this trance, you have the following effects.

details.unconsciousImmunity: You are immune to the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition.
details.cantCast: You can't cast or concentrate on spells.
details.deathSaves: You suffer 1 {@variantrule Death Saving Throw|XPHB} failure from damage from a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} instead of 2.
details.maintenance: Whenever you start your turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, you must expend 1 Focus Point to maintain a trance, and you make {@variantrule Death Saving Throws|XPHB} as normal.

features.name: Egotistical
features.description: Injuries to your pride enrage you. You are considered {@variantrule Bloodied|XPHB} if your current {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} are below your {@variantrule Hit Point|XPHB} maximum.
